CustomField.label: Discipline
CustomField.description: Specialist discipline for this field survey visit (e.g., Hydrology, Sage-Grouse, Botany). Must exactly match ServiceResource.nepa_discipline__c and NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt.Discipline__c. Populated by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The specialist discipline required for this field survey (e.g., Hydrology, Botany).
